case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. APRIL ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00- SERVED NOV-05-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, APRIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, APRIL $2,303.43 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,403.43, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,303.43 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, APRIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 1/9/2014 TO DEFENDANT. ENVELOPE MARK <RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2014 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ONLY APPEARS THIS DATE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK S.VAN TREE & M. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
